message:
feat(bd-33n): convert print_quickstart and print_import_welcome to Output abstraction

Major changes:
- Converted all 67 println! calls in print_quickstart() to output.print() with rich_rust markup
- Converted print_import_welcome() to use Output abstraction with rich_rust markup
- Added output: &Output parameter to both functions
- Updated pad closures to use Output::strip_markup() for width calculation
- Removed unused Colorize import from colored crate

Daemon fixes (unrelated):
- Fixed INVALID_INPUT -> INVALID_REQUEST error code
- Fixed clippy significant_drop_tightening warning
- Fixed clippy manual_let_else warning
- Fixed clippy let_and_return warning

Other pre-existing changes:
- Relaxed MRL dimension validation to accept any positive integer
- Added supports_mrl flag to FastEmbedModelEmbedder
- Added search mode aliases (keyword, bm25, vector, embedding, rrf, both)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
